creator: mwlucas@blackhelicopters.org
text:
Build fails with:

sc/ps_status.o utils/misc/superuser.o utils/misc/tzparser.o utils/mmgr/aset.o utils/mmgr/mcxt.o utils/mmgr/portalmem.o utils/resowner/resowner.o utils/sort/logtape.o utils/sort/tuplesort.o utils/sort/tuplestore.o utils/time/combocid.o utils/time/tqual.o utils/time/snapmgr.o utils/fmgrtab.o ../../src/timezone/localtime.o ../../src/timezone/strftime.o ../../src/timezone/pgtz.o ../../src/port/libpgport_srv.a -lintl -lxml2 -lpam -lssl -lcrypto -lgssapi_krb5 -lcrypt -lm -o postgres
libpq/auth.o: In function `pg_GSS_error':
auth.c:(.text+0x6e): undefined reference to `gss_display_status'
auth.c:(.text+0x8e): undefined reference to `gss_release_buffer'
auth.c:(.text+0xc5): undefined reference to `gss_display_status'
auth.c:(.text+0xe5): undefined reference to `gss_release_buffer'
libpq/auth.o: In function `pg_GSS_recvauth':
auth.c:(.text+0x7b8): undefined reference to `gss_delete_sec_context'
auth.c:(.text+0x8b4): undefined reference to `gss_accept_sec_context'
auth.c:(.text+0x958): undefined reference to `gss_release_buffer'
auth.c:(.text+0x9a7): undefined reference to `gss_release_cred'
auth.c:(.text+0x9c1): undefined reference to `gss_display_name'
auth.c:(.text+0xb2c): undefined reference to `gss_release_buffer'
auth.c:(.text+0xb9a): undefined reference to `gss_release_buffer'
auth.c:(.text+0xc4c): undefined reference to `gss_release_buffer'
libpq/pqcomm.o: In function `pq_close':
pqcomm.c:(.text+0x105a): undefined reference to `gss_delete_sec_context'
pqcomm.c:(.text+0x107d): undefined reference to `gss_release_cred'
gmake: *** [postgres] Error 1
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/postgresql84-server.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/postgresql84-server.

Fix: 

none known
How-To-Repeat: 
Try to build the port
